name: summarizer-ai
description: Text summarization and extraction by MEOK AI Labs.

tools.name: summarize_text
tools.description: Summarize text by extracting the most important sentences.

tools.name: extract_key_points
tools.description: Extract key points from text as bullet points.

tools.name: generate_abstract
tools.description: Generate a concise abstract from longer text.

tools.name: compare_summaries
tools.description: Compare two texts by their key terms and structural similarity.
